name: Bug report
about: Something is not working correctly

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. …
2. …
3. …

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Environment

- source-viz version: <!-- `npx source-viz --version` or package.json version -->
- Using: <!-- Web UI / CLI -->
- Browser (if Web UI): <!-- e.g. Chrome 124 -->
- Node.js version (if CLI): <!-- `node --version` -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 -->
